case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. RAUL ALEJANDRO ROMERO OJEDA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA DOMINGUEZ, COLLECTIONS ASSOCIATE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OJEDA, RAUL ALEJANDRO ROMERO $1,662.28 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,822.28, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN BALANCE OWED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OJEDA, RAUL ALEJANDRO ROMERO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,662.28 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT OJEDA, RAUL ALEJANDRO ROMERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
